data.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 3 (INTERMEDIATE). Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed. Pre-loading observations: (1) record-review.sh line 637 fail-opens when classifier-telemetry.jsonl is missing; (2) REVIEW-DEFENSE comment at line 621-623 references epic 1627-1ecf which is now closed, so the 'until wired' justification is stale; (3) reviewer-findings.json now contains review_tier (written by write-reviewer-findings.sh when --review-tier is passed, and all reviewer agents DO pass it); (4) harvest-worktree.sh does NOT copy classifier-telemetry.jsonl — the missing-telemetry scenario is the worktree harvest case.
